mechanism: Iterative comparison of observed category properties to individual-level predictions; category-level probability generalized erroneously to members via direct attribute inheritance (categorical inheritance) rather than exemplar/prototype inference.
distribution: equal probability individual outcomes, outcome dependent on categorical membership perception

mechanism: Sequence-based decision model tracking category elimination vs. preservation to manage subjective progression; value function weights completion markers (category elimination) differently for positive vs. negative valence contexts.
distribution: outcome valence dependent, progression perception as outcome

mechanism: Processing fluency induction (via numeric form) alters reliance weighting: fluent stimuli amplify affective path, disfluent stimuli amplify cognitive path; fit between processing mode and decision context intensifies final evaluations.
distribution: outcome reaction sign-dependent on context congruence

mechanism: Empirical hypothesis testing via correlation and factorial design to detect factors low in psychological salience; genre-as-schema influences acceptance/imagination thresholds for propositions in context-dependent manner.
distribution: outcome acceptance rate dependent on genre expectation match
